docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $297.04 FILED BY PREFERRED LEGAL SERVICES INC AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, MILLER, & MC GEE AKA MC GEE, LAFAYETTE, WILLIS AND GREENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
